CAPTCHA_REQUIRED: Please complete the captcha and try again.
CAPTCHA_INVALID: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 12 characters.
PASSWORD_BREACHED: This password has appeared in a known data breach. Please choose a different one.
INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
NO_GUILD_MEMBERSHIP: No guild membership. Join or create a guild to continue.
GUILD_USER_LIMIT_REACHED: This guild has reached its user limit. Ask a platform admin to raise it.
CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE: Cannot change your own guild role
CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot demote the last guild admin
GUILD_ROLE_NOT_ASSIGNABLE: That guild role can't be assigned.
NOT_GUILD_MEMBER: Not a member of this guild
CANNOT_LEAVE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot leave guild: you are the last admin. Promote another user to admin first.
CANNOT_LEAVE_SOLE_PM: Cannot leave guild: you are the sole project manager. Promote another member first.
CANNOT_LEAVE_OWNS_PROJECTS: Cannot leave guild: you still own projects in it. Pick a new owner for each before leaving.
CANNOT_REMOVE_OWNS_PROJECTS: Cannot remove member: they still own projects in this guild. Pick a new owner for each before removing them.
PROJECT_TRANSFER_RECIPIENT_INVALID: Project transfer target isn't a valid active member.
INVITE_EXPIRED_OR_USED: Invite has expired or has already been used
INVITE_EMAIL_MISMATCH: This invite was issued for a different email address
INITIATIVE_NOT_A_MEMBER: Not a member of this initiative
INITIATIVE_CANNOT_MODIFY_PM_PERMISSIONS: Project Manager permissions cannot be modified
INITIATIVE_CANNOT_CHANGE_BUILTIN_MANAGER: Cannot change manager status for built-in roles
INITIATIVE_MUST_HAVE_MANAGER: At least one manager role with members must remain
INITIATIVE_USER_NOT_IN_GUILD: User is not part of this guild
INITIATIVE_MUST_HAVE_PM: Initiative must have at least one project manager
INITIATIVE_ROLE_HAS_MEMBERS: Cannot delete role: members are still assigned to it
INITIATIVE_GUILD_ADMIN_ROLE_RESTRICTED: Guild admins already have full access and can only be assigned the project manager role
INITIATIVE_OVERRIDE_REQUIRES_GUILD_ADMIN: Only guild admins can change Full access for a role
INITIATIVE_OVERRIDE_PM_ONLY: Full access can only be granted to the Project Manager role
AUTH_PROVIDER_SLUG_RESERVED: This provider is managed by the single sign-on settings and can't be edited here
AUTH_PROVIDER_SLUG_TAKEN: A sign-in provider with this slug already exists
GUILD_AUTH_STEP_UP_REQUIRED: This guild requires signing in with its identity provider
GUILD_AUTH_POLICY_INVALID_PROVIDER: Pick an enabled sign-in provider for this requirement
GUILD_AUTH_POLICY_SELF_UNSATISFIED: Sign in with that provider yourself before requiring it for the guild
GUILD_AUTH_NOT_ENABLED: Per-guild authentication is not enabled on this platform
AUTH_PROVIDER_IN_USE: A guild's sign-in requirement uses this provider; change that requirement first
OIDC_EMAIL_UNVERIFIED: Your identity provider did not confirm your email is verified, so we can't sign you in to an existing account. Verify your email with your provider and try again.
PROJECT_NO_ACCESS: You don't have access to this project
PROJECT_GRANT_CANNOT_MANAGE_MEMBERS: Temporary access can't manage project members
PROJECT_PIN_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: Only guild admins and initiative managers can pin projects
PROJECT_DOCUMENT_WRONG_INITIATIVE: Document belongs to a different initiative
PROJECT_CANNOT_ASSIGN_OWNER_TO_ROLE: Cannot assign owner permission to a role
PROJECT_ROLE_WRONG_INITIATIVE: Role must belong to the project's initiative
TASK_ALREADY_IN_PROJECT: Task already belongs to this project
TASK_CANNOT_MOVE_TO_TEMPLATE: Cannot move task to a template project
TASK_PROJECT_MISMATCH: Task does not belong to this project
TASK_STATUS_NOT_FOUND_FOR_PROJECT: Task status not found for this project
TASK_ASSIGNEES_NOT_FOUND: One or more assignees not found
SUBTASK_NOT_FOUND_FOR_TASK: Subtask not found for this task
TASK_STATUS_CANNOT_REMOVE_LAST: Cannot remove the final status for this category
TASK_STATUS_FALLBACK_REQUIRED: A fallback status is required when tasks exist
TASK_STATUS_FALLBACK_MUST_DIFFER: Fallback status must be different from the deleted status
TASK_STATUS_FALLBACK_CATEGORY_MISMATCH: Fallback status must share the same category
TAG_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A tag with this name already exists
PROPERTY_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A property with this name already exists
PROPERTY_TYPE_CHANGE_BLOCKED: Cannot change property type while values exist. Remove attached values first.
PROPERTY_INVALID_VALUE_FOR_TYPE: Value does not match the property's type
PROPERTY_OPTION_NOT_IN_DEFINITION: Selected option is not valid for this property
PROPERTY_USER_NOT_IN_INITIATIVE: Referenced user is not a member of this initiative
PROPERTY_NOT_INITIATIVE_MEMBER: You need to be a member of this initiative to manage its properties
PROPERTY_OPTIONS_REQUIRED: Select and multi-select properties require at least one option
PROPERTY_DUPLICATE_OPTION_VALUE: Option values must be unique within a property
ATTACHMENT_STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: This guild has reached its storage limit

USER_CANNOT_REMOVE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot remove the last platform admin

PROJECT_EXPORT_INVALID_PAYLOAD: The project export file is invalid or corrupted.
PROJECT_EXPORT_NO_TASK_STATUSES: The project export has no task statuses, which is required for import.
EXPORT_INVALID_FORMAT: This export format isn't supported for this data.
EXPORT_TOO_LARGE: This export is too large. Narrow the filter and try again.
EXPORT_JOB_LIMIT_REACHED: You have too many exports in progress. Wait for one to finish and try again.
EXPORT_WRITE_REQUIRED: This export is too large to generate with read-only access.
EXPORT_NOT_READY: This export isn't ready to download yet.
EXPORT_ADMIN_REQUIRED: Only guild admins can export the whole guild.

fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

IMPORT_UNKNOWN_TYPE: This file isn't a recognized Initiative export.
IMPORT_INVALID_ENVELOPE: The import file is invalid or corrupted.
IMPORT_SCHEMA_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED: This file was exported by a newer version of Initiative and can't be imported here.

IMPORT_NOT_CANCELLABLE: This import can no longer be cancelled.
IMPORT_TOOL_DISABLED: That tool isn't enabled in the chosen initiative.
IMPORT_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: You don't have permission to create this content in the chosen initiative.
IMPORT_APPLY_FAILED: The import failed. Nothing was imported.
IMPORT_ACCESS_REVOKED: The import failed because access to the guild was revoked.
IMPORT_INTERRUPTED: The import was interrupted and may be incomplete. Check before retrying.
IMPORT_CREATOR_INACTIVE: The import failed because the requesting account is inactive.
IMPORT_ADMIN_REQUIRED: Only guild admins can import a backup.
IMPORT_NOT_CONFIRMABLE: This import can't be confirmed — it may have expired or already started.
IMPORT_ZIP_INVALID: This file isn't a valid Initiative backup.
IMPORT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: The backup's files don't fit in this guild's storage.
